title: Lightning BOLT12 Handler Config
description: Configuration for the com.musqet.bolt12 payment handler. The Business advertises a static BOLT12 offer; the Platform requests an invoice directly from the Business's Lightning node over the Lightning peer-to-peer network.

offer.description: The Business's BOLT12 offer string (bech32-encoded). MAY be amountless or amount-fixed.

display_name.description: Optional human-readable label for payment-method UI (e.g., 'Pay with Lightning').

supported_currencies.description: Currency codes the offer accepts (e.g., SAT, USD). When omitted, platforms SHOULD assume SAT only.
